steps.title: Identify the underlined role
steps.content: The underlined parenthetical comes immediately after the word microfilm. Its content explains what microfilm means: film containing scaled-down reproductions of documents.

steps.title: Reject unrelated functions
steps.content: Choice A would fit information about Frederick Douglass himself, but the underlined portion is about a storage format. Choice C would require a debate among historians, and none appears in the parenthetical. Choice D would require an unexpected finding, but the parenthetical only clarifies a term.

steps.title: Choose the definition function
steps.content: Because the underlined words define microfilm for readers, their function is to explain the meaning of a word used in the passage. The answer is B.
